data.name: WeekMortTotal.Expression
data.value: IIF(IsNullOrEmpty([Sat]), 0, [Sat]) + IIF(IsNullOrEmpty([Sun]), 0, [Sun]) + IIF(IsNullOrEmpty([Mon]), 0, [Mon]) + IIF(IsNullOrEmpty([Tue]), 0, [Tue]) + IIF(IsNullOrEmpty([Wed]), 0, [Wed]) + IIF(IsNullOrEmpty([Thru]), 0, [Thru]) + IIF(IsNullOrEmpty([Fri]), 0, [Fri])

data.name: $this.ScriptsSource
